ocr.text: In the context of the evolving wealth management landscape, the following analysis focuses on the asset under management
(AUM) and loan portfolio composition for JPMorgan Chase, highlighting key metrics that underscore our strategic positioning
in the North American market. The High Net Worth segment, representing a substantial portion of our client base, is reflected in
the AUM, which currently stands at $50B, with an impressive growth rate of 5.2%. This growth is indicative of our
commitment to providing tailored financial solutions that meet the needs of our affluent clientele. Additionally, the Ultra High
Net Worth category has shown resilience, with metrics such as a debt-to-equity ratio of "Debt/Equity," contributing to our
overall portfolio strength. The diversification of our loan offerings is evident, particularly in the Personal Loan sector, where we
maintain a robust average rate metric. Our strategic focus on maintaining a balanced approach is further demonstrated by the
15% average rate for Credit Card Debt, which aligns with our moderate risk profile.
As we look ahead, we anticipate continued growth in AUM driven by both organic and strategic initiatives, with expectations
for significant performance in upcoming fiscal periods, including a noteworthy milestone on 2025-09-01, as part of our loan
LoanType  OutstandingAmount  InterestRate  MaturityDate  DefaultRisk  CreditRating  PortfolioShare
Overall, these figures underscore our commitment to excellence and adaptability in an ever-changing financial environment.
